subprocess_tests.name: service_business_logic
subprocess_tests.purpose: Validate service behavior, deterministic rules, KPI calculations, and negative paths.

subprocess_tests.name: data_quality_and_lineage
subprocess_tests.purpose: Validate data freshness, lineage, completeness, uniqueness, referential checks, and drift.

subprocess_tests.name: ai_quality_and_explainability
subprocess_tests.purpose: Validate AI/RAG quality, hallucination regression, citations, SHAP/LIME explainability, and prompt stability when AI is involved.

subprocess_tests.name: security_governance_rbac
subprocess_tests.purpose: Validate RBAC/ABAC, policy-denied paths, prompt injection, tenant isolation, and audit fields.

subprocess_tests.name: performance_resilience_observability
subprocess_tests.purpose: Validate latency, throughput, retry/circuit breaker behavior, logs, traces, metrics, and correlation IDs.

subprocess_tests.name: human_workflow_and_approval
subprocess_tests.purpose: Validate human approval, exception handling, escalation, runbook, and rollback path for the process.

entries.description: Collect, validate, and report Environmental, Social, and Governance metrics for regulatory and investor disclosure
entries.inputs: Energy consumption, waste data, emissions records, social metrics, governance indicators
entries.outputs: ESG scorecard, GHG emissions report, regulatory disclosures, investor materials
entries.kpi: GHG emissions intensity, water use per unit, diversity metrics, reporting accuracy, audit pass rate
entries.data_needed: Utility data, logistics emissions, waste records, HR diversity data, governance policies

smoke.purpose: Daily fast health check for process API/data/AI contract drift.

full.purpose: Weekly full validation across functional, data, AI, governance, resilience, and human workflow checks.
